detail.description: Recruit artillery Minions that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your Command , then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.
Curse all targets in an area after a short delay. making Hits against them ignore a portion of their Armour .

from.text: Rattling Sceptre · Lupine Sceptre · Ochre Sceptre · Devouring Sceptre · Devotional Sceptre · Aromatic Sceptre · Pious Sceptre · Hallowed Sceptre

detail.description: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Warriors.
Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Frost Mages that can envelop your Minions in an icy shield on Command .

from.text: Portent Amulet · Uncut Spirit Gem Tier 8

detail.description: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions . The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions , regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.
Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Clerics that heal other minions and revive fallen Skeletons.
Activate to summon bomb-throwing, Reviving Skeletal Arsonists that can detonate other Minions on Command .
Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on Command .
Activate to summon aggressive, Reviving Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on Command . Skeletal Reavers do more Attack Damage and gain increased Attack speed based on their Rage
Activate to summon long-ranged, Reviving Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on Command .

Activate to summon hard-hitting, Reviving Skeletal Brutes that can Stun Primed enemies and Warcry on Command . This Warcry Intimidates nearby enemies and Consumes Freeze on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.

notes: Verify exact compatible skill tags from PoE2DB before marking as verified.

detail.description: Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.

notes: Verify exact minion or command compatibility before marking as verified.

detail.description: Supports Skills which summon Minions . Supported Minions deal more Damage the more different kinds of Reviving Minions you have summoned.

notes: Verify exact compatible hit and damage tags before marking as verified.

detail.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits .

notes: Verify exact command compatibility and tier naming before marking as verified.

detail.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions have significantly increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.
Supports Curse Skills, magnifying their power.
Supports Curse skills, causing them to Curse enemies more quickly after being cast.

notes: Verify exact cast-speed support tier naming before marking as verified.

detail.description: Supports Spells , causing them to cast faster.
Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.
Supports skills which create Minions , granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions .
Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions , causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration.

notes: Use only after verifying the linked minion can benefit from the required hit or damage behavior.

detail.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit .
Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit .
